creator: cvelbar@gmail.com
text:
Not the original reporter.
My system (Lenovo ThinkCentre desktop) hangs completely when trying to load amdgpu.
Monitor goes black and system is unresponsive, no ssh and no graceful shutdown pressing shortly the power button.

I have removed drm-fbsd12.0-kmod and rebuilt it from the updated ports and making sure to have the sources for 12.2 in /usr/src

Relevant pciconf -lv section

vgapci0@pci0:10:0:0:	class=0x030000 card=0x314117aa chip=0x15dd1002 rev=0xd3 hdr=0x00
    vendor     = 'Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. [AMD/ATI]'
    device     = 'Raven Ridge [Radeon Vega Series / Radeon Vega Mobile Series]'
    class      = display
    subclass   = VGA
